title: MailerLite vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs Brevo. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
intro: MailerLite and Brevo are two popular email marketing platforms with freemium models, but they target different user needs. MailerLite focuses on simplicity and design features for small businesses, while Brevo emphasizes multi-channel marketing and transactional email capabilities. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API

choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer wanting an intuitive, beginner-friendly email editor
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys built into your platform
E-commerce integrations and visual campaign building are your priorities
You want to start completely free with up to 1,000 subscribers
choose_b_if: You need multi-channel marketing including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat
You require a CRM system integrated with email marketing
You send transactional emails and need a robust API
You have a large subscriber base and want unlimited free contacts (up to 100,000)
You want an all-in-one business communication platform

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for beginners and small businesses prioritizing design and ease of use, with higher user ratings (4.6 vs 4.5 on G2). Brevo is better for businesses needing multi-channel marketing, CRM features, and transactional email capabilities. Choose based on your specific requirements rather than overall superiority.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Brevo?
faq.a: Brevo offers significantly better free tier value with 100,000 free subscribers compared to MailerLite's 1,000. However, MailerLite starts paid plans at $9/month versus Brevo's $25/month. For growing businesses, Brevo's free tier may cost less overall, but small freelancers benefit from MailerLite's lower entry price.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports and exports. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists in standard formats (CSV), which you can then import into MailerLite. However, you may lose some campaign history and automation workflows during the switch, so plan accordingly.

Yes, Brevo is specifically designed as an all-in-one CRM suite with email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat capabilities. MailerLite focuses primarily on email marketing with additional features like landing pages and pop-ups, but lacks native SMS and messaging channels.
